customManagers.description: Track the pinned upstream commit we mirror-build (UPSTREAM_REF in the build workflow). git-refs against the main branch raises a PR to bump the digest when upstream moves.

packageRules.description: anisette-v3-server bundles Apple's closed-source ADI libs and a D build; an upstream bump can change provisioning behaviour and can only be fully verified with a real device. Never auto-merge — review + the CI smoke build (which asserts the PR #47 provisioning folder) gate each bump.
